title: Specs implied by installation location, not stated
notes: Nothing says IP44/IP65 explicitly — the rating is implied by the location (bathroom, garage, outdoors). The catalog has ordinary variants of every item; picking the non-hermetic one is the natural model error. Wall-mounted outdoor motion sensor: detection angle unstated, so both 120° and 180° wall IP44 sensors are accepted.

customer.name: Jan Kowalczyk
customer.profile: Private home owner finishing a house, describes needs by room, not by spec.

request: Wykańczamy dom i potrzebuję: do łazienki gniazda pojedyncze 4 szt (musi wytrzymać wilgoć), do garażu oprawa świetlówkowa LED 120cm 2 szt, nad wejście od zewnątrz czujnik ruchu na ścianę, oraz zwykłe gniazda podtynkowe pojedyncze białe do salonu 10 szt.
